physical_therapy.prior_function: Ambulated with single-point cane at home; lives alone
physical_therapy.current_mobility: Ambulated 25 feet with front-wheeled walker and contact guard assist; intermittent confusion noted
physical_therapy.weight_bearing: Weight bearing as tolerated left lower extremity
physical_therapy.stairs: Not attempted — patient resides on second floor; discharge planning requires HHA support
physical_therapy.recommendation: Discharge home with home health aide and skilled nursing for medication management and mobility; outpatient PT when HHA completes initial course
goals: Ambulate 75 feet with walker and contact guard assist

occupational_therapy.adl_status: Requires moderate assist for bathing and dressing; cognitive impairment limits independent medication management
occupational_therapy.home_safety: Lives alone on second floor of walk-up building; son visits weekly. Recommend HHA for ADL support, meal preparation, and medication reminders. Nightlights and removal of throw rugs.
